name: Advanced Village
description: Continues from Basic. Town Hall for Big Celebrations, Hero's Mansion for oases, Residence for settlers.

stages.name: Stage 1 - Town Hall to 10
stages.notes: Town Hall 10 unlocks Big Celebrations - massive culture point boost, allows founding new villages faster.

stages.name: Stage 2 - Hero's Mansion
stages.notes: Level 10 captures first oasis, level 15 second, level 20 third.

stages.name: Stage 3 - Residence for settlers
stages.notes: Residence level 10 trains 2 settlers for founding new villages.

roman.notes: No tribe-specific additions in advanced template for Romans.

teuton.notes: Brewery is capital-only and requires Granary 20 + Rally Point 10. Will be handled in a dedicated capital template.

gaul.notes: Upgrade Trapper for stronger passive defense during expansion stage.

stage_additions.name: Stage 2b - Trapper upgrade (Gaul only)
stage_additions.notes: Level 10 Trapper holds significantly more enemy troops passively.
